name: Optimizely Data Platform
description: Sync Segment analytics events and user profile data to Optimizely Data Platform

apiKey.label: Api Key
apiKey.description: Api Key used for Optimizely API authorization when sending events

region.label: Region
region.description: Optimizely Region to sync data to. Default is US

customEvent.title: Ecommerce Event
customEvent.description: Send Segment Ecommerce track() events to Optimizely Data Platform

user_identifiers.label: User identifiers
user_identifiers.description: User identifier details to send to Optimizely.

optimizely_vuid.label: Optimizely VUID
optimizely_vuid.description: Optimizely VUID - user cookie generated created by Optimizely Javascript library

event_type.label: Optimizely Event Type
event_type.description: The Optimizely Event Type. Defaults to "custom" if not provided

event_action.label: Optimizely Event Action
event_action.description: The name of the Optimizely Event Action.

products.label: Product details
products.description: Product details to associate with the event. Product ID field is required for each product

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Enable batching of event data to Optimizely.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of events to batch before sending to Optimizely.

nonEcommCustomEvent.title: Custom Event

user_identifiers.description: User identifier details to send to Optimizely.

optimizely_vuid.label: Optimizely VUID
optimizely_vuid.description: Optimizely VUID - user cookie generated created by Optimizely Javascript library

event_type.label: Optimizely Event Type
event_type.description: The Optimizely Event Type. Defaults to "custom" if not provided

event_action.label: Optimizely Event Action
event_action.description: The name of the Optimizely Event Action.

data.label: Event Properties
data.description: Additional information to send with your custom event

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Enable batching of event data to Optimizely.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of events to batch before sending to Optimizely.

upsertContact.title: Upsert Contact
upsertContact.description: Send user profile data from Segment to Optimizely Data Platform. Creates or updates a user profile in Optimzely Data Platform

user_identifiers.label: User identifiers
user_identifiers.description: User identifier details to send to Optimizely.

optimizely_vuid.label: Optimizely VUID
optimizely_vuid.description: Optimizely VUID - user cookie generated created by Optimizely Javascript library

company.label: Company Name
company.description: The name of the company associated with the Contact

DOB.label: Birthday
DOB.description: Contact's birthday. The format should be datetime

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Enable batching of event data to Optimizely.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of events to batch before sending to Optimizely.

emailEvent.title: Email Event
emailEvent.description: Send email related Segment track() events to Optimizely Data Platform

user_identifiers.label: User identifiers
user_identifiers.description: User identifier details to send to Optimizely.

email.label: Email
email.description: User Email address. This is a required field

optimizely_vuid.label: Optimizely VUID
optimizely_vuid.description: Optimizely VUID - user cookie generated created by Optimizely Javascript library

event_action.label: Optimizely Event Action
event_action.description: The name of the Optimizely Event Action.

link_url.label: Link URL
link_url.description: URL of the link which was clicked

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Enable batching of event data to Optimizely.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of events to batch before sending to Optimizely.

presets.name: Email Marked as Spam
presets.subscribe: type = "track" and event = "Email Marked as Spam"
